assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Provides specific weekend maintenance windows with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA and BYDAY=SU configurations

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags with proper RFC format

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific quarterly freeze exclusions with 30-day periods (December 1-31, March 1-31 examples)

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Includes specific November audit exclusion configuration with November 1-30 timeframe

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance for handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Clearly states in the controlled upgrade process section that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows/exclusions

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Regular or Stable channels and explains Extended channel option, providing rationale for each

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with all required flags including --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
